title: Simple, powerful & visual
text: Event Flow is designed to make managing your work and life effortless. With a clean interface and powerful visual tools, you stay organized without the overwhelm.

section.title: Why Event Flow?
section.content: Because your goals deserve clarity. Event Flow combines team collaboration and personal life planning into one seamless platform, keeping everything in sync.

section.title: Why Visual Planning?
section.content: Seeing your goals and tasks visually helps you track progress, stay motivated, and never lose sight of what matters most.
